content.text:
I'll analyze all 8 fixes first. They all target the same 4 lines (35, 164, 167, 170) and all relate to removed PatternFly v5 CSS classes for the Select component that have no v6 equivalent:

- `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-wrapper` (line 35)
- `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-group` (lines 164, 167, 170)

In PF v6, the old `pf-v5-c-select` component was replaced by a new composable `Select` built on top of `Menu`/`MenuList`/`MenuGroup`. The CSS classes changed accordingly:
- `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-wrapper` → In PF v6, the menu content is rendered in `.pf-v6-c-menu` 
- `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-group` → In PF v6, groups use `.pf-v6-c-menu__group`

Let me read the file first:

Now let me analyze the 4 affected lines:

**Line 35:** `cy.contains('.pf-v5-c-select__menu-wrapper', cdSource.pvcName).click();`
- Uses `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-wrapper` — a removed CSS class with no v6 equivalent.
- In PF v6, the Select component is rebuilt on Menu. The menu items are in `.pf-v6-c-menu__list-item`.
- Looking at the nearby code for `clonePVC` case (lines 75-76), I can see the pattern already migrated there: `cy.contains('.pf-v6-c-menu__list-item', diskSource.pvcName).click();`
- So the PVC selection on line 35 should follow the same pattern.

**Lines 164, 167, 170:** `cy.get('.pf-v5-c-select__menu-group').eq(N).find('ul>li').first().click();`
- Uses `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-group` — a removed CSS class with no v6 equivalent.
- In PF v6, menu groups use `.pf-v6-c-menu__group`.
- The `.find('ul>li')` pattern maps to finding items within a menu group's list.
Now let me verify the final state of the file:
All changes are correctly applied. Let me also verify there are no remaining `pf-v5-c-select` references in the file:

No remaining `pf-v5-c-select` references. All occurrences have been replaced.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Lines | Status | Detail |
|-----|------|-------|--------|--------|
| Fix 1 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select` | 35, 164, 167, 170 | ✅ Applied | Replaced `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-wrapper` with `.pf-v6-c-menu__list-item` (line 35); replaced `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-group` with `.pf-v6-c-menu__group` (lines 164, 167, 170) |
| Fix 2 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-menu` | 35, 164, 167, 170 | ✅ Applied | Same lines — covered by the same replacements as Fix 1 |
| Fix 3 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-menu-group` | 164, 167, 170 | ✅ Applied | `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-group` → `.pf-v6-c-menu__group` on all three lines |
| Fix 4 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-menu-wrapper` | 35 | ✅ Applied | `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-wrapper` → `.pf-v6-c-menu__list-item` (consistent with existing `clonePVC` pattern at line 76) |
| Fix 5 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select` | 35, 164, 167, 170 | ✅ Applied | Same lines — covered by the same replacements |
| Fix 6 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select-menu` | 35, 164, 167, 170 | ✅ Applied | Same lines — covered by the same replacements |
| Fix 7 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select-menu-group` | 164, 167, 170 | ✅ Applied | Same lines — covered by the same replacements |
| Fix 8 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select-menu-wrapper` | 35 | ✅ Applied | Same line — covered by the same replacement |

**Summary:** All 8 fixes target the same 4 lines and collectively address 3 removed PF v5 Select CSS classes. The replacements use PF v6 Menu component equivalents:
- `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-wrapper` → `.pf-v6-c-menu__list-item` (line 35) — matches the existing migrated pattern at line 76 for the `clonePVC` case
- `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-group` → `.pf-v6-c-menu__group` (lines 164, 167, 170) — PF v6's Menu component uses `__group` for grouped menu sections

chunks.response:
No remaining `pf-v5-c-select` references. All occurrences have been replaced.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Lines | Status | Detail |
|-----|------|-------|--------|--------|
| Fix 1 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select` | 35, 164, 167, 170 | ✅ Applied | Replaced `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-wrapper` with `.pf-v6-c-menu__list-item` (line 35); replaced `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-group` with `.pf-v6-c-menu__group` (lines 164, 167, 170) |
| Fix 2 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-menu` | 35, 164, 167, 170 | ✅ Applied | Same lines — covered by the same replacements as Fix 1 |
| Fix 3 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-menu-group` | 164, 167, 170 | ✅ Applied | `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-group` → `.pf-v6-c-menu__group` on all three lines |
| Fix 4 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-menu-wrapper` | 35 | ✅ Applied | `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-wrapper` → `.pf-v6-c-menu__list-item` (consistent with existing `clonePVC` pattern at line 76) |
| Fix 5 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select` | 35, 164, 167, 170 | ✅ Applied | Same lines — covered by the same replacements |
| Fix 6 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select-menu` | 35, 164, 167, 170 | ✅ Applied | Same lines — covered by the same replacements |
| Fix 7 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select-menu-group` | 164, 167, 170 | ✅ Applied | Same lines — covered by the same replacements |
| Fix 8 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select-menu-wrapper` | 35 | ✅ Applied | Same line — covered by the same replacement |

**Summary:** All 8 fixes target the same 4 lines and collectively address 3 removed PF v5 Select CSS classes. The replacements use PF v6 Menu component equivalents:
- `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-wrapper` → `.pf-v6-c-menu__list-item` (line 35) — matches the existing migrated pattern at line 76 for the `clonePVC` case
- `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-group` → `.pf-v6-c-menu__group` (lines 164, 167, 170) — PF v6's Menu component uses `__group` for grouped menu sections
